name: Christian Ferry, Campaign Manager, Lindsey Graham 2016
subject: FWD:: (Friend, did you see this?) Stand with Lindsey
body:
Friend, did you see Senator McCain's email yesterday? It's absolutely critical you see and read it below.

Senator Graham's honorable service to our country is being attacked. [**If there was ever a time for you to stand with Senator Graham, the moment is right now.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29542349:28322193049:m:1:877327319:A25ED54726D656D3A88B2015BFD348F2:r)

[**Click here.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29542349:28322193049:m:1:877327319:A25ED54726D656D3A88B2015BFD348F2:r)

Thanks,

Christian

| |

---
---
|
Friend,

Running for President comes with both the good and bad - I should know. It's a remarkable opportunity to travel our great nation and meet Americans in every corner of every state, but it also opens you and your family up to vicious attacks.

Right now, Senator Lindsey Graham is facing just that. Earlier this week, _The Washington Post_ launched a misleading, outrageous attack on Senator Graham's service in the U.S. Air Force. And today, _The New York Times_ ran an equally outrageous editorial demeaning his military career.

In response, several military leaders who Senator Graham served with and under in Iraq and Afghanistan, including General David Petraeus, [issued statements](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29542350:28322193049:m:1:877327319:A25ED54726D656D3A88B2015BFD348F2:r) applauding Lindsey's service and refuting the attacks.

**Apparently these liberal Obama supporters have nothing else to do but unfairly dissect and denigrate Senator Graham's distinguished service to our country.**

In the face of these liberal attacks, **Lindsey needs to know that you're with him right now**.

**[Please join me and stand with Lindsey Graham and support his campaign for President.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29542349:28322193049:m:1:877327319:A25ED54726D656D3A88B2015BFD348F2:r)**

Our nation is at a crossroads. The leader we elect in 2016 will determine the path our nation takes. Lindsey Graham is the proven, experienced leader our nation so desperately needs. We cannot allow these liberal blowhards to distort his record or slander his service any more.

If you want to reverse the wrongs done by President Obama and get our country back on a path of prosperity and security, then **[join me in supporting Lindsey Graham](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29542349:28322193049:m:1:877327319:A25ED54726D656D3A88B2015BFD348F2:r)**.

Thanks for your continued support.

Sincerely,

John McCain

P.S. Lindsey needs to know he can continue to count on us. **[Please show him he can by making an instant online contribution to his campaign right now](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29542349:28322193049:m:1:877327319:A25ED54726D656D3A88B2015BFD348F2:r)**. Thank you.

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29542349:28322193049:m:1:877327319:A25ED54726D656D3A88B2015BFD348F2:r) |

| Paid for by Lindsey Graham 2016

But for daring to stand up and fight to end NSA spying and defund Planned Parenthood, the media is looking to skewer Senator Paul.

And I'm sure his Big Government opponents will try to pile on as well.

When Senator Paul takes the stage tomorrow night, he needs to know you'll be standing in his corner with him.

**[So please sign your Republican Debate Mandate before tomorrow night's deadline](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29546777:28324647047:m:1:879035888:F2479DE17970DA7A035E333EAD350FA2:r)**.

And **[please chip in a contribution of $20.16 to help Rand Paul](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29546777:28324647047:m:1:879035888:F2479DE17970DA7A035E333EAD350FA2:r)** show a surge of support and recent contributors before tomorrow night's debate.

Alexandra

\---------- Begin Forwarded Message ----------

**Subject** : Bracing for the worst
**From** : randhpaulmd@gmail.com
**To** : Fellow Conservative

Fellow Conservative:

The first of nine scheduled Republican presidential debates is set to kick off Thursday, August 6th in Cleveland.

With the field set, I know one thing is certain...

For daring to stand up to the Big Government status-quo in Washington, D.C., I know there are plenty of members in both the media and my own Republican Party who would love to diminish my campaign.

But for the life of me, I don't see how they can.

Not with polls showing me leading Hillary Clinton in key swing states like Colorado, Iowa, Pennsylvania, Ohio, and New Hampshire.

But with all the funny business my campaign has already seen, I'm not taking anything for granted!

**[That's why I'm counting on you to please click here to sign your Republican Debate Mandate IMMEDIATELY](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29546777:28324647047:m:1:879035888:F2479DE17970DA7A035E333EAD350FA2:r)**.

With time running out before the debate starts, I can't begin to explain just how important your support is today.

A strong performance can catapult a serious candidate to the very top of the primary polls.

But a bad answer to a left-wing moderator's "gotcha question" can crush a leading candidate's campaign overnight.

And with no clear Republican primary frontrunner, the stakes are higher right now than ever before.

The good news is, the American people are flocking to my campaign in support of my strong stands to:

*** CUT TAXES AND SPENDING. We need to blow up our current complicated and confusing tax code and start over. My Fair and Flat Tax would eliminate the payroll tax -- the biggest tax most Americans pay -- return $2 TRILLION to the American people over ten years, grow our GDP by a whopping 10% and result in at least 1.4 million new jobs;

*** PASS TERM LIMITS to end the reign of career politicians in Washington, D.C.;

*** FORCE MEMBERS OF CONGRESS TO ACTUALLY READ THE BILLS THEY VOTE ON, and stop their habit of ramming thousand-page bills into law at the last minute before anyone knows what's being voted on;

*** REPEAL ALL OF OBAMACARE to stop the soaring health insurance premium costs, policy cancellations, shuttered hospitals and poorer quality healthcare that have all resulted from this outrageous federal takeover;

*** AUDIT THE FEDERAL RESERVE to end the "print-now, ask-questions-later" policies that result in boom-bust economic cycles like the recent housing and financial crises;

*** PROTECT THE ENTIRE BILL OF RIGHTS. That means protecting our religious liberties, political speech, gun rights and our Fourth Amendment right to privacy from government spying.

But I'm afraid my challenge to the Big Government "consensus" in Washington, D.C. has made me a top target for Big Government members of BOTH parties -- and our national media.

I know media types like to masquerade as "objective."

But let's not kid ourselves.

For months now, media "experts" have spouted predictions that November 2016 will be a showdown between two candidates with yesterday's last names pushing yesterday's failed Big Government policies.

And then we learned that one news anchor - a past debate moderator and former Clintonista - was caught contributing $75,000 to Hillary Clinton's Foundation!

Knowing how strong my poll numbers are against Hillary Clinton, is it any wonder both the press and their Democrat allies have tried to attack me with everything they have?

They know I'm the biggest threat to the Big Government status-quo today.

They know the American people are ready to finally DEFEAT the Washington Machine.

And they know that the debates mark the first time many Americans begin to "tune in" to the presidential race.

That's why I'm bracing for the worst.

In the past, you and I have seen moderators attempt to skew debate outcomes by making themselves the story -- or doling out time and softball questions to candidates who most agree with their Big Government beliefs.

Is more of this madness in store?

I believe your action today can help decide that.

The more recent contributors my campaign can boast -- to go along with our strong poll numbers -- the harder it will be for our national media to engage in any more "funny business" \-- or launch any more attacks and smears against me.

Not only that, but your generosity will help my campaign ramp up our grassroots efforts in the key early states of Iowa, New Hampshire, South Carolina and Nevada.

With your support, my campaign will be able to pay for everything from bumper stickers and palm cards, to pizza for volunteers, to campaign mail, email, social media, and even Internet and TV ads!

All of this, combined with strong debate performances and a feverish campaign stop schedule are what I believe it will take to WIN.

Fellow Conservative, with your help, that's exactly what I intend to do.

But I can't defeat the Washington Machine without you.

**[So please sign your Republican Debate Mandate IMMEDIATELY to let me know you're standing with me during this most critical time](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29546777:28324647047:m:1:879035888:F2479DE17970DA7A035E333EAD350FA2:r)**.

And if possible, **[please chip in $20.16](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29546777:28324647047:m:1:879035888:F2479DE17970DA7A035E333EAD350FA2:r)** right away.

I know that's a lot.

But I have a lot of work to do. And with the first debate right around the corner on August 6th, I MUST show a surge of recent contributors as soon as possible!

If $20.16 is just too much, **[please chip in at least $10](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29546777:28324647047:m:1:879035888:F2479DE17970DA7A035E333EAD350FA2:r)**.

I know I'm going to be walking into a lion's den when these Republican presidential debates kick off.

I'm counting on you to please stand with me.

**[Please click here to sign your Republican Debate Mandate, and chip in $20.16 IMMEDIATELY](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29546777:28324647047:m:1:879035888:F2479DE17970DA7A035E333EAD350FA2:r)**!

| [Chip in $10 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29546778:28324647047:m:1:879035888:F2479DE17970DA7A035E333EAD350FA2:r)

Rand Paul

body:
Fellow Conservative:

The Washington Machine wants payback.

When I led the fight to defund Planned Parenthood and forced Obama's illegal NSA spying to expire, I proved I'm 100% serious about upending the business as usual status-quo.

And in tomorrow night's debate, the establishment politicians and the media will be gunning for me.

**[With under 30 hours remaining until the debate kicks off, I need to count on you to stand with me as I carry my message to defeat the Washington Machine to a national audience](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29551567:28330155474:m:1:879035888:77AFE32B06B5BDFB1813C6CA841F8651:r)**.

Fellow Conservative, tomorrow night's debate will be the first time many Americans tune in to our party's nominating contest.

The media is trying to write the story that this debate will help narrow the field to a few "acceptable" Republicans.

I'm used to media funny business and smear attacks.

But with polls showing me as the Republican best positioned to defeat Hillary Clinton, I am bracing for the worst.

That's because Americans are hunting around for a candidate who will stand up to the establishment and say Big Government's days are numbered.

My campaign has prepared a special video about why I'm the biggest threat to the Washington Machine and I hope you will take a few moments to watch it.

And I need your help to spread this message before the first question is asked at tomorrow night's debate.

As you and I have seen, a strong debate performance can shoot a candidate to the top of the polls.

But constitutional conservatives have also witnessed moderators press their thumbs down on the scales to favor candidates and toss up softball questions to candidates who agree with their Big Government beliefs.

Is more of this madness in store tomorrow night?

With a wide-open field, the stakes are higher than ever.

So I'm counting on your help to send the strongest message possible heading into tomorrow night's debate.

subject: Has it all been decided?

body:
Fellow Conservative:

You can forget all the campaign stops, interviews and speeches until this point...

For many Americans, the 2016 presidential race kicks off with tomorrow night's debate.

Fellow Conservative, less than 24 hours from now, I'm going to be walking into a lion's den.

The media and my opponents are going to try and skewer me for daring to stand up to the Washington Machine on everything from NSA spying, to my Fair and Flat Tax plan, to defunding Planned Parenthood.

Can I count on you to stand in my corner? **[Will you chip in a contribution of $20.16 right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29554060:28333776846:m:1:879035888:C2E5447B788C49333B0D1677B8E4E1D8:r)**?

The truth is, from the beginning of this race, the press has had their favorites.

They tell us November 2016 has already been decided.

It's been whittled down to just a handful of "acceptable" candidates who don't dare rock the Big Government boat in Washington, D.C.

They forget it's good folks like you who decide elections. Not them!
But the truth is, most Americans only start to zero in on the race for the presidency with the launch of the first debates.

That's why it's vital that my campaign shows a burst of momentum.

The more support I can show leading up to the debate, the more likely it will stave off funny business by the media.

This race is wide open. The stakes are higher than ever.

body:
Don't miss out: | Friend --

Thursday is the first Republican Presidential Debate (yep, already). Here's your to-do list to be prepared:
* Stock up on soft projectiles to hurl at your television to give your jeering some attitude (marshmallows get the job done).

* Make sure your phone has a full charge so you can tweet about the dangerous policies that candidates like Jeb Bush, Marco Rubio, and Scott Walker are proposing.

* **[Sign up for The Briefing -- our campaign's rapid response list -- so you can be the first to know exactly how we're responding to all the insane things the Republicans say.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjMxOTYwNjES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjIwMzg1ODY5S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

They're going to throw a lot of lies at Hillary (they always do), and my team will generate hard-hitting rapid response videos, infographics and more to fight back. name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: It's important to our state!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
Friend,

On Thursday night, the Republican Party hosts its first presidential debate. This will be the first time the top ten Republican candidates will be together on one stage talking about their vision and ideas for America.

YIKES!

You may not think this is an important night for Maryland Democrats, but please think again. Think about how few Democrats came out to exercise their right to vote in our state in last year's election. Think about how this BLUE state went RED -- and it can happen again.

I urge you to sit down with your family and watch this debate to remind yourself, and every Democrat in our state, that elections matter. We can't take anything for granted at the polls in 2016. We have to TURN OUT TO VOTE if we want to keep the destructive GOP agenda out of the White House, the U.S. House of Representatives and the U.S. Senate.

So your homework is to turn the TV on tomorrow night and watch the debate. It's important to our state!

[_**Click here to let us know if you 're going to watch the debate.**_](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91e9d/70cdc2ba/479db5db/3950aba/4029748884/VEsH/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/watch-the-gop-debate")

Many thanks,
Chris
| Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
